title: Best sunscreens | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best sunscreens. Compare options and find one that fits.

pros: Lightweight, non-greasy; good for acne-prone/sensitive skin

recommendations.product_name: La Roche-Posay Anthelios Melt-In Milk Sunscreen SPF 60
pros: High SPF (60) with lightweight, fast-absorbing texture
Well-suited for face and body; recommended for sensitive skin
cons: Some users report white cast on deeper skin tones

recommendations.product_name: Neutrogena Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch Sunscreen SPF 55
cons: Some formula changes/users report variable performance
May feel drying for very dry skin
